title: Turkish Listed Company Document Manifest
description: Manifest format for source documents stored for a Turkish listed company.

companyKey.description: Stable lowercase BIST ticker code matching the folder name.

companyName.description: Official or commonly used company name.

market.description: Exchange or market where the company is listed.

documents.description: Documents stored in the company folder.

fiscalYear.description: Fiscal year covered by the document.

quarter.description: Fiscal quarter covered by the document, or null for annual/non-quarterly documents.

documentType.description: Document category such as activity_report, annual_report, investor_presentation, or financial_statement.

title.description: Document title as published by the source.

localPath.description: Path to the PDF relative to the company folder.

sourceUrl.description: Original source URL for the document.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code for the document.

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the document was added to the repository, or null if not recorded.

notes.description: Optional notes about the document. Keep empty if not needed.
